# Grow on LinkedIn & Instagram —without living in your feed all day.

The grind

## You know you should be active on LinkedIn. You just don’t have 3 hours a day.

Showing up where your buyers are shouldn’t mean choosing between your pipeline and your presence. [...] 2

### Engage → connect → engage

Comment on one post for context, send a short no-pitch connection note, then engage with 1–2 more posts.

3

### Wait ~2 days after accept

When they accept, the bot pauses — no pitch on accept. Engagement already happened during outreach.

4

### Opening DM

One personalized message: lead with them, one specific observation, an open question — never a yes/no opener or call ask.

5

### One follow-up, then done

If there's no reply, exactly one soft follow-up goes out — pressure-free, with an easy out. Then the person moves to completed.

### Outreach principles baked in

The AI is briefed on warm-outreach rules — so you get curiosity over conversion, not spray-and-pray sales spam. [...] First message is about them, not you
 Connection notes reference their actual content — no pitch
 Bio and price come late, only when asked
 Exactly one follow-up if ghosted — then move on
 Human tone: contractions, no template phrases

Full networking bot details

How it works

## Live in five steps — minutes, not days.

1

### Activate

Paste your license key into the SocialKaptan desktop app.

2

### Connect

Log into LinkedIn once. AI comments use credits included in your plan.

3

### Configure

Set keywords, hashtags, product info & comment style per bot.

4

### Run

Start a bot, watch real-time logs, let daily mode run in the background.

5

### Grow

Show up consistently in the right conversations — while you run the business.

Why SocialKaptan

results.title: SocialKaptan — AI LinkedIn & Instagram Growth on Your Desktop | AI Kaptan | AI KAPTAN
results.content:
AI KAPTAN

# Grow on LinkedIn & Instagram on autopilot.

SocialKaptan is a desktop app that runs safe, AI-powered engagement and posting on your own computer, with your accounts. Like, comment, and publish while you focus on closing deals.

Totally agree — the manual part is what kills consistency. We automate the repetitive outreach locally so the rep’s session never touches a shared cloud IP. Happy to share how we pace it.

## You know you should be active on LinkedIn. You just don’t have 3 hours a day.

You miss posts from your ideal customers because you’re in meetings.

Manual commenting is slow, inconsistent, and easy to forget.

Cloud “bots” feel risky — shared IPs, shared sessions, account bans.

Scheduling tools publish content, but don’t help you engage where it matters. [...] ### Instagram Comment Bot

Show up in the conversations your buyers are already having.

### AI Post Generator & Scheduler

From idea to published post — without opening ChatGPT five times.

### One-time account setup

Log in once. SocialKaptan reuses your session securely on-device.

### Built-in safety controls

Growth without gambling your account.

### Want it tuned to your product?

We’ll help you set keywords, voice, and limits so SocialKaptan sounds like you from day one.

## From license key to live growth in 5 steps

### Activate

Paste your license key into the SocialKaptan desktop app.

### Connect

Log into LinkedIn once. Add your AI API keys (Groq; Gemini optional).

### Configure

Set keywords, hashtags, product info, and comment style per bot.

### Run [...] Agencies juggling multiple brands need control, limits, and visibility — not another black box.

## Your social growth co-pilot — on your machine, on your terms.

SocialKaptan automates the repetitive parts of LinkedIn and Instagram growth: finding relevant posts, liking, leaving thoughtful AI replies, and publishing from a content queue. Everything runs in your own Chrome session on your desktop, so you stay in control and off shared cloud infrastructure.

## Everything you need to show up consistently

Five tools in one desktop app — engagement, publishing, and the safety controls to run it all without gambling your account.

### LinkedIn Comment Bot

Turn keyword searches into consistent, high-quality engagement.

### Instagram Comment Bot
